title: Lamp-Lit Room Reveal
summary: Ada rises fully into motion, crosses into the living room, and the apartment resolves under amber lamp light as a lived-in, occupied world.

narrative.newInfo: Ada's home reveals itself as warm, used, and stabilizing, deepening reader trust in both her life and the setting.
narrative.dripHook: The room becomes legible, and with it the larger rhythm of Ada's routine.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Atmosphere reward: the apartment becomes pleasurable to inhabit rather than merely functional.
narrative.notes: Bridge from wakefulness into full scene habitation. Prioritize inference-driven domestic detail and the false-morning feel of interior lamp light against late-day gray outside.

rewardTokens.description: Amber lamp light and selective domestic detail make the apartment feel real and inhabited.
Ada moves through the apartment by practiced memory, suggesting routine before work.

modelUpdate.before: The reader is grounded in bodily waking and darkness.
modelUpdate.shift: The apartment resolves as a stable, lived-in environment.
modelUpdate.after: Ada's world feels trustworthy enough that later deviations will register cleanly.
